name: the All-Tide
title: the Empty Seat

voice.tone: unknown — no living priest has heard it; the others speak of it the way children speak of a parent's empty chair
imagery: a tide-mark on the world's rim

blessing.text: The All-Tide grants nothing. The All-Tide is not here.

priest.title: the Drowned Priest
priest.arrival: Does not arrive. Waits at the bottom of the Drop, holding a rite that has run for three generations.

lore: SPOILER SPINE (L3): the sea IS the All-Tide — the pantheon were aspects of it. Restoring the ocean is resurrecting this god. The Ascension fills or shares or abandons this seat. Not attunable in normal play; exists as data so the fork, the epilogues, and the pantheon UI have a real id to point at.
